name: Abacus Mining and Exploration Corp.
description: Abacus Mining and Exploration Corp. is a Canada-based mineral exploration stage company. The Company is engaged in the acquisition, exploration and development of mineral properties, primarily focusing on copper and gold. Its key projects include the Ajax copper-gold project located near Kamloops, British Columbia, in which it holds a 20% carried interest, and the Willow copper property located in the Yerington copper district of Nevada, where it holds an option to acquire a 100% interest.
